title: alsine verna var. propinqua
intro: Alsine verna var. propinqua, also known as Alsine verna or Spring Whitlowgrass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Pink family (Caryophyllaceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Alsine verna var. propinqua include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use as a diuretic to help with urinary problems. Alsine verna var. propinqua can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
